# AI-Powered PDF Data Extraction Tool (Shopify Orders → Excel) – Full-Stack Developer

**Duration:** 1 to 3 months

---

## Skills & Expertise

**Mandatory:** AI App Development, API Integration, Python, Data Processing, Scripting, Data Extraction, Natural Language Processing, Automation, Google Sheets

---

## Job Description

We are looking for an experienced developer to build a lightweight internal web application that extracts structured data from Shopify order PDFs and prepares it for operational use.

Our company manages a high volume of event bookings. Each booking contains important details (event date, time, address, child info, etc.) that must currently be manually entered into our internal system.

This process is time-consuming and error-prone.

We want to build a tool that:
- reads booking PDFs
- extracts key fields (even when formats vary)
- flags missing or uncertain data
- allows quick human review/edit
- exports a clean Excel/CSV file (for Google Sheets use)

----------------------------------------

PROJECT GOAL

Build an AI-assisted + rule-based extraction tool that:

1. Accepts PDF uploads  
2. Extracts structured booking data  
3. Normalizes formats (dates, times, etc.)  
4. Flags missing or ambiguous fields  
5. Provides a review/edit interface  
6. Exports a standardized CSV/Excel file  

This is NOT fully automated — human validation is required before export.

----------------------------------------

IMPORTANT CONTEXT

The PDFs contain mixed data:
- sometimes structured (clear labeled fields)
- sometimes semi-structured
- sometimes messy (manual/draft orders)

Data can be in:
- English or French
- different date/time formats
- inconsistent wording

The solution must handle real-world messy data, not just clean inputs.

----------------------------------------

CORE FEATURES (MVP)

- PDF upload (single file is fine for v1)
- Data extraction (rules + AI)
- Data normalization (date, time, age, phone, etc.)
- Validation & flagging system
- Review/edit interface
- CSV/Excel export

----------------------------------------

IMPORTANT

We are NOT looking for a system that relies only on AI guessing.

We want a practical approach:
- use rules when possible
- use AI for messy/unstructured text
- clearly flag uncertainty
- allow human review before export

----------------------------------------

TO APPLY

Please include:

1. Examples of similar work (PDF parsing, automation, AI extraction, etc.)
2. Your proposed tech stack
3. How you would approach:
   - extracting data from inconsistent PDFs
   - handling French + English content
   - validation and error handling
4. Estimated timeline
5. Fixed-price estimate for MVP

----------------------------------------

We are looking to start quickly and build a solid MVP first.

See attached examples of:
- target data structure (Intranet screenshot)
- 2 sample input PDFs (clean and messy formats)

Bonus: If you include a brief outline of your extraction + validation approach, it will be prioritized.
